follow_ups.title: Run Qwen3-ASR MLX cumulative recompute behind a real local service boundary
follow_ups.reason: The current Qwen3 cumulative prototype validates in-process session semantics but not IPC, process supervision, wall-clock scheduling, or Swift client behavior.

follow_ups.title: Probe MiMo-V2.5-ASR MLX as final-only and coarse incremental backend
follow_ups.reason: MiMo has strong file-level quality but needs real latency, memory, and coarse partial evidence before it can be considered beyond final-quality reference.
